title: Upgradable Armor
description: Upgradable Armor with mod support - Any Armor.
body:
Upgradable Armor - upgrade your armor easily by just putting same armor material with armor on the center!

Features:
- Supports every single armor in game even modded ones
- Supports armors that are crafted from materials that can't be creafted into a block
- Durability check to prevent being too OP, like stick armor with sticks[configurable]
- Fully configurable max tier limit
- Supports regular enchants withotu any issues

BETA:
- REWRITE OF MOD, SUPPORT FOR TOOLS,SWORDS

Know issues:
- Has problem with armors needign more than one material or complicated ones.

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4fc4394754bbe25cfde0eb4315c6b3da45ee556.png)

Suggestions and Bug request -> **[There!](https://discord.gg/MpuFrKAYtK)**
